title: bupleurum spinosum
intro: Bupleurum spinosum, also known as Thorny Bupleurum, is a flowering plant species in the carrot family Apiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and supporting liver function. Bupleurum spinosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
